visa_types.name: Medical treatment and diagnosis
visa_types.visa_fees:
Application fees applicable from 09 March 2022:

[deu > mng > en > Table:Visit Family/ Friends > Visa Fees 1]

Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid at  VAC by cash or card only in Mongolian  Tugrugs.
Exemption of Visa  Fee:
- Children below 6  years on the date of submission
- School pupils,  students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for  the purpose of study or educational training
- Researchers from  third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research
- Representatives of  non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars,  conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit  organizations
- Family member of  EU/EEA and Switzerland nationals.
Service Fee 98,000 MNT  (Inclusive of VAT)
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee in MNT is as per the current  exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
visa_types.processing_time:
Normally, processing time for visa application is starting from next working day (Excluding public holiday and weekend) at least 15 calendar days, counting from when all requested documents have been submitted at Embassy of the Federal Republic of Germany. The visa application submitted in Ulaanbaatar Germany Visa Application Centre will be delivered to the Embassy of the Germany in Ulaanbaatar next working day of your application submission;
This period may be extended in specific cases up to 30-60 days, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation.
visa_types.forms:
When applying for a  Schengen visa please fill in the application form online (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt) and print it with barcode  generated.
Guidelines for form  filling you can find here.
The completed  application form has to be submitted along with the other required documents (#shorttermvisa).
							Applicants can have their Schengen application forms filled in at the visa applications centre. The form filling service is voluntary and does not influence the decision on the application.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This  category applies to applicants who wish to visit Germany for medical treatment  and diagnosis. It includes Medical  Patients and accompanying medical escorts travelling with the patient.
Visa Application Requirements:
- application form (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt) Please note that only application on Videx form is accepted at the VAC.
- travel document
- photo
- biometric features – fingerprints
- fee
- checklist for supporting document
NOTE: All your supporting documents shall be in English or German. The Mongolian documents shall have the English or German translation.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This  category applies to applicants who wish to visit Germany for medical treatment  and diagnosis. It includes Medical  Patients and accompanying medical escorts travelling with the patient.
Visa Application Requirements:
- application form (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt) Please note that only application on Videx form is accepted at the VAC.
- travel document
- photo
- biometric features – fingerprints
- fee
- checklist for supporting document
NOTE: All your supporting documents shall be in English or German. The Mongolian documents shall have the English or German translation.

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable from 09 March 2022:

[deu > mng > en > Table:Visit Family/ Friends > Visa Fees 1]

Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid at  VAC by cash or card only in Mongolian  Tugrugs.
Exemption of Visa  Fee:
- Children below 6  years on the date of submission
- School pupils,  students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for  the purpose of study or educational training
- Researchers from  third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research
- Representatives of  non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars,  conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit  organizations
- Family member of  EU/EEA and Switzerland nationals.
Service Fee 98,000 MNT  (Inclusive of VAT)
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee in MNT is as per the current  exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.

## Documents Required
Checklist for Medical Treatment (https://ulan-bator.diplo.de/mn-de/service/05-VisaEinreise/-/2651850)

## Photo Specifications
All photos must  meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met,  the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The  photo requirements are the same for children as for adults.
The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus,  clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on  quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with  a light background
- be 35-45 mm in  width
- maximum 6 months  old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing  the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head  and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that  are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes
Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed  as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot  be coloured
- the rim must not  cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be  reflection in the glasses
Regarding head-dress:
Religious  head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly  shown.
- Chin, forehead and  both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face  due to the head-dress are not allowed
- Samples  of correct photos can be found here (https://www.bundesdruckerei.de/de/system/files/dokumente/pdf/Fotomustertafel-300dpi.pdf).

## Processing Time
Normally, processing time for visa application is starting from next working day (Excluding public holiday and weekend) at least 15 calendar days, counting from when all requested documents have been submitted at Embassy of the Federal Republic of Germany. The visa application submitted in Ulaanbaatar Germany Visa Application Centre will be delivered to the Embassy of the Germany in Ulaanbaatar next working day of your application submission;
This period may be extended in specific cases up to 30-60 days, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation.

## Download Forms
When applying for a  Schengen visa please fill in the application form online (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt) and print it with barcode  generated.
Guidelines for form  filling you can find here.
The completed  application form has to be submitted along with the other required documents (#shorttermvisa).
							Applicants can have their Schengen application forms filled in at the visa applications centre. The form filling service is voluntary and does not influence the decision on the application.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category applies to who wish to: 
Who have graduated from University or completed Vocational Training are interested in working in a regulated profession (e.g., medical or caregiving professions) in Germany can apply for a visa to enhance their qualifications or compensate for any skills gaps as part of the recognition process for their profession.
Visa Application Requirements:
- application form (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt) Please note that only application on Videx form is accepted at the VAC.
- travel document
- photo
- biometric features – fingerprints
- fee
- checklist for supporting document
NOTE: All your supporting documents shall be in English or German. The Mongolian documents shall have the English or German translation.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category applies to who wish to: 
Who have graduated from University or completed Vocational Training are interested in working in a regulated profession (e.g., medical or caregiving professions) in Germany can apply for a visa to enhance their qualifications or compensate for any skills gaps as part of the recognition process for their profession.
Visa Application Requirements:
- application form (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt) Please note that only application on Videx form is accepted at the VAC.

- photo
- biometric features – fingerprints

NOTE: All your supporting documents shall be in English or German. The Mongolian documents shall have the English or German translation.

## Photo Specifications

- maximum 6 months  old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing  the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head  and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that  are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes
Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed  as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot  be coloured
- the rim must not  cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be  reflection in the glasses
Regarding head-dress:
Religious  head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly  shown.
- Chin, forehead and  both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face  due to the head-dress are not allowed

This period may be extended in specific cases up to 30-60 days, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation.

## Download Forms
When applying for a  Schengen visa please fill in the application form online (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt) and print it with barcode  generated.
Guidelines for form  filling you can find here.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category applies to who wish to: Studying at a University / College study (§16b AufenthG)
Studying in Language Preparatory Courses for University Admission (§16b AufenthG) 
University Admission Visa (§17 AufenthG)
Visa Application Requirements:
- application form Please note that only application on Videx form is accepted at the VAC.
- required documents
- photo
- biometric features – fingerprints
- fee
- checklist for supporting document
NOTE: All your supporting documents shall be in English or German. The Mongolian documents shall have the English or German translation.

## Visa Fees

[deu > mng > en > Table:Student Visa > Visa Fees 1]

Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid at VAC by cash or card only in Mongolian Tugrugs.
Service Fee 98,000 MNT (Inclusive of VAT)
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee in MNT is as per the current  exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.

## Documents Required
Checklist for Student visa

## Photo Specifications
All photos must  meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met,  the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The  photo requirements are the same for children as for adults.
The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus,  clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on  quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with  a light background
- be 35-45 mm in  width
- maximum 6 months  old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing  the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head  and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that  are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes
Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed  as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot  be coloured
- the rim must not  cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be  reflection in the glasses
Regarding head-dress:
Religious  head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly  shown.
- Chin, forehead and  both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face  due to the head-dress are not allowed
- Samples  of correct photos can be found here (https://www.bundesdruckerei.de/de/system/files/dokumente/pdf/Fotomustertafel-300dpi.pdf).

## Processing Time
Normally, processing time for visa application is starting from next working day (Excluding public holiday and weekend) at least 6-8 week, counting from when all requested documents have been submitted at Embassy of the Federal Republic of Germany. The visa application submitted in Ulaanbaatar Germany Visa Application Centre will be delivered to the Embassy of the Germany in Ulaanbaatar next working day of your application submission.

## Download Forms
When applying for a  Schengen visa please fill in the application form online (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-langfristiger-aufenthalt) and print it with barcode  generated.
Guidelines for form  filling you can find here.
The completed  application form has to be submitted along with the other required documents.
							Applicants can have their Schengen application forms filled in at the visa applications centre. The form filling service is voluntary and does not influence the decision on the application.

Visa Application Requirements:
- application form (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt) Please note that only application on Videx form is accepted at the VAC.
- travel document
- photo
- biometric features – fingerprints
- fee
- checklist for supporting documents
NOTE: All your supporting documents shall be in English or German. The Mongolian documents shall have the English or German translation.

## Photo Specifications
All photos must  meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met,  the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The  photo requirements are the same for children as for adults.
The Photo shall:

Glasses are allowed  as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot  be coloured
- the rim must not  cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be  reflection in the glasses
Regarding head-dress:
Religious  head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly  shown.
- Chin, forehead and  both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face  due to the head-dress are not allowed
- Samples  of correct photos can be found here (https://www.bundesdruckerei.de/de/system/files/dokumente/pdf/Fotomustertafel-300dpi.pdf).

## Processing Time
Normally, processing time for visa application is starting from next working day (Excluding public holiday and weekend) at least 15 calendar days, counting from when all requested documents have been submitted at Embassy of the Federal Republic of Germany. The visa application submitted in Ulaanbaatar Germany Visa Application Centre will be delivered to the Embassy of the Germany in Ulaanbaatar next working day of your application submission;
This period may be extended in specific cases up to 30-60 days, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation.

When applying for a  Schengen visa please fill in the application form online (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt) and print it with barcode  generated.

- maximum 6 months  old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing  the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head  and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that  are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes
Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed  as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot  be coloured
- the rim must not  cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be  reflection in the glasses
Regarding head-dress:
Religious  head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly  shown.
- Chin, forehead and  both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face  due to the head-dress are not allowed
- Samples  of correct photos can be found here (https://www.bundesdruckerei.de/de/system/files/dokumente/pdf/Fotomustertafel-300dpi.pdf).

## Processing Time
Normally, processing time for visa application is starting from next working day (Excluding public holiday and weekend) at least 15 calendar days, counting from when all requested documents have been submitted at Embassy of the Federal Republic of Germany. The visa application submitted in Ulaanbaatar Germany Visa Application Centre will be delivered to the Embassy of the Germany in Ulaanbaatar next working day of your application submission;
This period may be extended in specific cases up to 30-60 days, notably when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation.

## Download Forms
When applying for a  Schengen visa please fill in the application form online (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt) and print it with barcode  generated.
Guidelines for form  filling you can find here.
The completed  application form has to be submitted along with the other required documents (#shorttermvisa).
							Applicants can have their Schengen application forms filled in at the visa applications centre. The form filling service is voluntary and does not influence the decision on the application.

Religious  head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly  shown.

When applying for a  Schengen visa please fill in the application form online (https://videx.diplo.de/videx/visum-erfassung/videx-kurzfristiger-aufenthalt) and print it with barcode  generated.
Guidelines for form  filling you can find here.
The completed  application form has to be submitted along with the other required documents (#shorttermvisa).
							Applicants can have their Schengen application forms filled in at the visa applications centre. The form filling service is voluntary and does not influence the decision on the application.
